metadata.name: Compare On-Farm Seed Variety Trial Performance

description: A farmer planted several different corn hybrids in trial strips across a field and wants to analyze the yield data to see which performed best.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the yield map from the combine harvester.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the yield data for the field.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the as-planted map, which shows where each hybrid was planted.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the map of the trial layout.

nodes.task_description: Overlay the yield and as-planted maps and calculate the average yield for each hybrid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the average yield for each specific seed variety.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report ranking the hybrids by yield and calculating the return on investment for each, considering seed cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a report showing which hybrid was the most profitable.
